image:image.image:title: LS Image Compressor — Free Online Image Compressor
image:image.image:caption: Compress images up to 90% smaller in your browser. 100% private, no upload, no signup.

image:image.image:title: LS Image Compressor PDF Compressor
image:image.image:caption: Compress PDF files up to 90% smaller in your browser. Strong, Balanced, and Light presets.

image:image.image:title: LS Image Compressor Bulk File Renamer
image:image.image:caption: Rename hundreds of files at once with 13 live rules. Download as a ZIP.

image:image.image:title: About LS Image Compressor
image:image.image:caption: The story, founder, and stack behind LS Image Compressor.

image:image.image:title: Contact LS Image Compressor
image:image.image:caption: Email, GitHub, Instagram, LinkedIn — all the ways to reach us.

image:image.image:title: LS Image Compressor Privacy Policy
image:image.image:caption: How LS Image Compressor handles your data. Spoiler: we do not collect anything.

image:image.image:title: LS Image Compressor Terms of Service
image:image.image:caption: Free for personal and commercial use, no warranty, your files stay on your device.

image:image.image:title: LS Image Compressor logo
image:image.image:caption: The LS Image Compressor brand mark — a lightning bolt sign for fast, private, in-browser image compression.

image:image.image:title: LS Image Compressor favicon
image:image.image:caption: Favicon for LS Image Compressor — lightning bolt mark in monochrome.

image:image.image:title: Girish Lade — Founder of LS Image Compressor
image:image.image:caption: Profile photo of Girish Lade, founder and solo developer of LS Image Compressor. Image served in modern AVIF format.

image:image.image:title: Girish Lade — Founder of LS Image Compressor
image:image.image:caption: Profile photo of Girish Lade, founder and solo developer of LS Image Compressor. Image served in WebP format.

image:image.image:title: LS Image Compressor Apple touch icon
image:image.image:caption: Apple touch icon for LS Image Compressor — 180x180 PNG.
